Container.Name: RetroVault
Container.Overview: RetroVault is a self-hosted retro game collection manager for collectors, flippers, and hunters. Track your inventory, pull live market prices from PriceCharting, calculate real net profit after eBay fees, and use Field Mode at garage sales to instantly know what to buy and what to pass on. Supports 35 platforms from Atari 2600 to Xbox Series X.
Container.DonateText: If RetroVault saves you money on a deal, consider supporting development.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the RetroVault web interface.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Where RetroVault stores your collection data, config, and scraped prices. Back up this folder!

Config.Name: YouTube API Key
Config.Description: (Optional) Free YouTube Data API v3 key from console.cloud.google.com — enables in-modal game videos.

Config.Name: GitHub Issues Token
Config.Description: (Optional) Fine-grained GitHub token with Issues:Write — enables in-app bug reporting.
